capabilities.name: Native e-signature (capture + evidence)
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_contract create (service, 50000 SEK, body_markdown) → send_contract_for_signature returned token + public URL and status pending_signature → public contract-sign accept with a signature_image PNG data-URL → contract status active; get_contract_certificate returned signer name/email, signature_image, content_hash c43c72a5285a96b3…, ip_address, signed_at. Reframed per docs/parity/references/quotes-contracts-sign-odoo.md — the SMB gap was capture UI + evidence artifact, not a provider. Built 2026-07-04: (1) draw-signature capture on src/pages/PublicContractPage.tsx via shared src/components/public/SignaturePad.tsx (plain canvas, undo/clear, no new deps), Type/Draw tabs, drawn PNG data-URL sent as signature_image and stored in contract_signatures.signature_image (migration 20260704100000_esign-hardening.sql; sanitized server-side in supabase/functions/contract-sign/index.ts); typed-name path unchanged; (2) evidence artifact — contract-sign stores content_hash (SHA-256 of canonical agreement content: title/counterparty/body_markdown/value/version) on the signature row and in audit_logs metadata; printable certificate page (src/pages/SignatureCertificatePage.tsx, route /contract/:token/certificate) renders signer, signature image or typed name, timestamp, IP, user-agent, hash via token-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC get_contract_certificate; linked from the public confirmation and from ContractEditorPage. send_contract_for_signature skill instructions document the evidence trail and certificate URL. NOTE: no signing-deadline enforcement for contracts — the contracts table has no offer-expiry field (end_date is the contract term), deliberately not added this round.
capabilities.notes: Verified scope: SINGLE external signer (counterparty) with full capture+evidence — which is what this capability names. Known gaps, not blocking done but tracked: no company countersign (two-party flow is the remaining SMB depth item per the reference card) and no signed-PDF artifact (print-to-PDF from the certificate page is the deliberate scope, same as quotes). Provider integrations (Scrive/DocuSign/BankID) remain integration-only per the reference card. Test contract terminated after the run.
